title: WASM: Rc<RefCell<>> pattern for single-threaded WASM is correct
description: wasm/src/transport.rs and client.rs: use Rc<RefCell<>> and Rc<Cell<>> throughout. WASM is single-threaded; Arc<Mutex<>> would be unnecessary overhead. The explicit comment in api.rs explaining why clone is safe and why borrow doesn't span yield points is valuable. A contributor might suggest 'simplifying' to Arc<Mutex<>> for familiarity, but that would add cost with no safety benefit in WASM.
